briefs.title: BC Provincial Nominee Program fee rises from $1,475 to $1,750 effective January 22
briefs.summary: BC has increased the application fee under the Provincial Immigration Programs Regulation from $1,475 to $1,750. This change took effect January 22, 2026, and applies to anyone applying through BC's Provincial Nominee Program (a program that lets BC nominate skilled workers or graduates for Canadian permanent residence).
briefs.action_required: Update your budget and inform any employees or candidates applying through BC's Provincial Nominee Program of the new $1,750 fee.
